name: Dark Chocolate Walnut Bark
recipeIngredient: 2 Bars (8 oz each) dark chocolate candy, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a large cookie sheet with waxed paper.
2. Spread the walnuts out in a single layer, close together, on the waxed paper; set aside.
3. Place the dark chocolate in a 1 1/2-quart microwave-safe bowl.
4. Microwave on medium (50%) for 2 minutes; stir.
5. Microwave on medium for 30 seconds to 1 minute longer, or until the chocolate can be stirred smooth and is glossy, stirring twice.
6. Immediately pour over the walnuts, spreading out to a thin, even layer. Let stand until firm.
7. Place the white chocolate in a 1-quart microwave-safe bowl.
8. Microwave on medium for 1 1/2 to 2 1/2 minutes or until the white chocolate can be stirred smooth, stirring twice.
9. With the tip of a metal spoon or a pastry bag fitted with a small writing tip, drizzle the white chocolate over the dark in a zig-zag pattern.
10. Let stand to set or refrigerate; break into pieces.
11. Store in an airtight container with waxed paper between layers in a cool, dry place. Makes 1 1/4 pounds.
